About us
Agile Labs is a dynamic and forward-thinking technology company that uses US-Patented Low-Code Technology to help businesses achieve their goals faster, easier, and cost-effectively. Our award-winning flagship platform, Axpert, is a cloud-based platform that allows businesses to rapidly develop and deploy enterprise applications without the need for extensive coding knowledge. Headquartered in Bangalore, Karnataka, India, Agile Labs has over 20 years of experience and a proven track record of success in a wide range of industries, including healthcare, banking, manufacturing, and logistics. We have helped businesses build their own ERP systems, workflow solutions, e-governance applications, and more. Axpert caters to over 500 customers and over 40000 users. Our proven technology, Axpert, enables developing complex applications in half the time, effort, cost, and skill required by traditional software development methods. With a track record spanning over two decades, we have overcome the 'Made in India' obstacle and achieved recognition in 10+ global regions, including esteemed markets such as the India, Canada, Middle East and North America. Key benefits - Rapid Development - Axpert can help businesses develop and deploy enterprise applications up to 50% faster than traditional software development methods. Ease of Use - Axpert is a user-friendly platform that can be used by business users with no prior coding experience. Scalability - Axpert is a scalable platform that can easily be adapted to the changing needs of businesses. Security - Axpert is a secure platform that meets the highest industry standards. Is Your Car Business Doomed Without ERP? In the competitive automotive industry, many dealerships and repair shops struggle with inefficiencies that lead to failure, often overlooking the power of Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems. Without automotive ERP, inventory mismanagement causes overstocking or shortages, draining profits and frustrating customers. Supply chain disruptions, like global chip shortages, become unmanageable without real-time tracking and alerts. Financial errors multiply from manual accounting, leading to cash flow crises and overlooked rebates. Customer service suffers as scattered records delay repairs and erode loyalty. Operational bottlenecks waste time on outdated workflows, hindering scalability. ERP provides absolute control by integrating all aspects, from procurement to sales forecasting. It uses AI for predictive analytics, ensuring compliance and reducing costs. Businesses adopting ERP see up to 20% efficiency gains, per industry reports. Ultimately, skipping ERP invites chaos, while embracing it drives success in this fast-paced sector. #AutomotiveERP #CarBusinessSuccess #ERPforDealerships #AutoIndustryEfficiency #InventoryManagement #SupplyChainSolutions #BusinessGrowth

India’s leadership gap is a critical issue that extends beyond entry-level positions, particularly affecting those over 40. In a recent briefing by GlobalBiz and partners, it was revealed that only about 10% of key managerial roles are held by women. While entry-level hiring may seem robust, it conceals a leaky pipeline, with mid-career attrition exacerbated by menopause stigma sidelining experienced talent when it is most needed. HR leaders must recognize the importance of tracking progression after 40, as mid-career retention significantly influences overall performance. Gender bias often morphs into age bias: men over 40 are perceived as “experienced,” while women in the same age bracket face labels such as “expensive,” “inflexible,” or “nearing exit.” Many capable women do not voluntarily leave; instead, they are gradually edited out, leading organizations to lose more than just diversity points. The consequences include a loss of institutional memory, steady leadership, and long-term strategic thinking. This short film underscores the hidden costs of losing wisdom and highlights the necessity of inclusive talent retention for genuine business resilience. If this resonates, please like and share to foster change and conversation in your network. #GenderBias #AgeBias #WomenAtWork #DiversityAndInclusion #TalentRetention #Leadership #CostOfLosingWisdom #WomenInLeadership #IndiaInc #MidCareerRetention #MenopauseAtWork

About us
Agile Labs is a dynamic and forward-thinking technology company that uses US-Patented Low-Code Technology to help businesses achieve their goals faster, easier, and cost-effectively. Our award-winning flagship platform, Axpert, is a cloud-based platform that allows businesses to rapidly develop and deploy enterprise applications without the need for extensive coding knowledge. Headquartered in Bangalore, Karnataka, India, Agile Labs has over 20 years of experience and a proven track record of success in a wide range of industries, including healthcare, banking, manufacturing, and logistics. We have helped businesses build their own ERP systems, workflow solutions, e-governance applications, and more. Axpert caters to over 500 customers and over 40000 users. Our proven technology, Axpert, enables developing complex applications in half the time, effort, cost, and skill required by traditional software development methods. With a track record spanning over two decades, we have overcome the 'Made in India' obstacle and achieved recognition in 10+ global regions, including esteemed markets such as the India, Canada, Middle East and North America. Key benefits - Rapid Development - Axpert can help businesses develop and deploy enterprise applications up to 50% faster than traditional software development methods. Cost-Effectiveness - Axpert is a cost-effective solution for businesses of all sizes. Our platform can help businesses save on development costs, maintenance costs, and training costs. Ease of Use - Axpert is a user-friendly platform that can be used by business users with no prior coding experience. Scalability - Axpert is a scalable platform that can easily be adapted to the changing needs of businesses. Security - Axpert is a secure platform that meets the highest industry standards. To learn more about our innovative solutions, visit us at www.agile-labs.com or www.agilecloud.biz

About
At Agile Labs, we developed an enterprise-level Low Code-No Code Platform that digitalizes workflow processes & delivers real-time data reports and insights. On Axpert, build highly-secure solutions without extensive coding.
Axpert is a revolutionary US-patented, RAD platform that simplifies Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), reducing complex processes. It is easier to create and deploy apps custom-fit for your business needs and demands.
Deliver productive workforce by harmonizing complex architecture. Reduce 50% of Cost, Time, & Effort by developing codeless solutions. Axpert allows the integration of legacy software and third-party apps an easy breeze.
Streamline enterprise functionalities & accelerate digital transformation with secure on-cloud compliance. The intuitive configuration and visual interface empower both technical & citizen developers.
Get a demo with our team and explore growth possibilities for your business.
This product is intended for
- Chief Information Officer
- Chief Technology Officer
